title: Split runtime.rs (1415 lines) into domain sub-modules
purpose: runtime.rs is 1415 lines — nearly three times the 500-line limit. The file contains binary matching/construction helpers, closure helpers, message helpers, and map helpers all interleaved with core allocation primitives. Splitting by domain improves navigability, isolates change surfaces, and aligns with the project's file size constraints.
task: Split crates/beamr/src/jit/runtime.rs into domain-specific files: runtime_binary.rs, runtime_closure.rs, runtime_message.rs, and runtime_map.rs. The remaining runtime.rs core retains shared allocation and process primitives. All extern "C" function signatures must remain unchanged. Update mod.rs to expose the new modules.

requirements.title: Extract binary runtime helpers into runtime_binary.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract binary matching and construction runtime helpers (JitMatchContext, JitBinaryBuilder, jit_bs_start_match, jit_bs_get_integer, jit_bs_get_binary, jit_bs_get_tail, jit_bs_get_float, jit_bs_test_tail, jit_bs_skip, jit_bs_init, jit_bs_put_integer, jit_bs_put_binary, jit_bs_put_float, jit_bs_put_string, jit_bs_finish, and segment decode/encode functions) into crates/beamr/src/jit/runtime_binary.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature.
acceptance: runtime_binary.rs contains JitMatchContext and JitBinaryBuilder structs
runtime_binary.rs contains all jit_bs_* functions
All extern "C" function signatures are identical to pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr binary-related tests pass

requirements.title: Extract closure runtime helpers into runtime_closure.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract closure runtime helpers (jit_alloc_closure, jit_call_closure, call_native_closure, call_interpreted_closure, runtime_module_registry, runtime_cache) into crates/beamr/src/jit/runtime_closure.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature.
acceptance: runtime_closure.rs contains jit_alloc_closure, jit_call_closure
runtime_closure.rs contains call_native_closure, call_interpreted_closure
runtime_closure.rs contains runtime_module_registry and runtime_cache accessors
All extern "C" function signatures are identical to pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr closure-related tests pass

requirements.title: Extract message runtime helpers into runtime_message.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract message runtime helpers (jit_send_message, jit_receive_next, jit_receive_mark, jit_receive_wait, jit_receive_done, transition_process_to_waiting, and related message queue functions) into crates/beamr/src/jit/runtime_message.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature.
acceptance: runtime_message.rs contains jit_send_message and all jit_receive_* functions
runtime_message.rs contains transition_process_to_waiting
All extern "C" function signatures are identical to pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr message-related tests pass

requirements.title: Extract map runtime helpers into runtime_map.rs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL extract map runtime helpers (jit_map_new, jit_map_update, jit_map_get, jit_map_has_key, map_update, write_map_entries) into crates/beamr/src/jit/runtime_map.rs. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature.
acceptance: runtime_map.rs contains jit_map_new, jit_map_update, jit_map_get, jit_map_has_key
runtime_map.rs contains map_update and write_map_entries
All extern "C" function signatures are identical to pre-extraction versions
Test: cargo test -p beamr map-related tests pass

requirements.title: Runtime core under 500 lines, no extern signature changes
requirements.spec: WHEN the split is complete, runtime.rs (retaining alloc_tuple, alloc_cons, charge_reduction, jit_call_interpreted, jit_box_float, process_from_abi, alloc_words, and shared utilities) SHALL be under 500 lines. Each extracted file SHALL be under 500 lines. THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature across any file.
acceptance: wc -l runtime.rs < 500
wc -l runtime_binary.rs < 500
wc -l runtime_closure.rs < 500
wc -l runtime_message.rs < 500
wc -l runtime_map.rs < 500
grep -c 'extern "C"' across all runtime files matches the pre-split total
No extern "C" function has a changed signature

boundaries: SHALL NOT change any extern "C" function signature — JIT-compiled code calls these by address
SHALL NOT change function behavior, only file location
SHALL NOT move shared utilities (process_from_abi, alloc_words) out of runtime.rs — these are used by all domain modules
SHALL NOT create circular dependencies between runtime sub-modules
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
Each extracted runtime_*.rs file is under 500 lines
All extern "C" function signatures are unchanged
